content: Central DB: litigation_context.db (10.22 GB, 694+ tables, 15.73M rows). Lane DBs: lane_A_custody.db through lane_F_appellate.db. Agent DB: agents/master_index.db. ALWAYS use: PRAGMA busy_timeout=60000; PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL; PRAGMA cache_size=-32000. Max 3 concurrent connections. Use managed_db() from db_lock_manager.py.
